title: Comedy Gameplay YouTube Edit: Sizzle Cut, Reframed Shorts Variant, Meme Cutaway Graphics + Clickbait Thumbnail
one_line_ask: Turn raw comedy gameplay footage plus client notes, custom graphics and a music folder into a punchy 1080p H.264 YouTube cut with a vertical Shorts variant, polished meme/text-callout overlay graphics, a denoised commentary track, and a clickbait thumbnail PNG — all organized into one reusable project package.

assets.name: royalty_free_music_folder

qc.method: fal stable-audio-2.5 music gen; both stems verified non-silent (mean -14/-16 dB, peak 0 dB), 14s each, instrumental no-vocals matching brief (trap 140bpm + comedic ukulele)

assets.note: Folder of two royalty-free-stand-in instrumental loops as required by the brief.

issues: The exclamation 'Aaaah!' was rendered as 'Ah,', which may reduce the intended length and intensity of the vocalization.
The highly emphatic 'YES! LET'S GOOO!' was rendered as 'Yes, let's go.', losing the strong emphasis and prolonged 'o' sound, which significantly diminishes the intended excitement and triumph.

qc.transcript: Oh no, no, no. Not like this. Not like this, guys. Oh, he's flanking. Bro, why is my teammate like this? He's just standing there. Haha. Oh man, that was a close one. I almost had him. Okay, okay, regroup, regroup. No, don't push. Ah, wait, wait, I got it. I got it. Yes, let's go. Oh my god, that wa

issues: Photo of a phone screen introduces glare and reflection, but subject is still clear.
Slight tilt and JPEG softness present, but within brief's tolerance.
Text is clear, bold, and in meme style as required.
In-game character is exaggerated and slightly blurry, matching the brief.
No real-world brands/logos visible.
Meme aesthetic is achieved, but the phone frame and background are visible, which could distract from the asset as a source input.
panel.text_found: POV:  your teammate has the aim of a potato

issues: Image is a photo of a phone screen rather than a direct digital asset, introducing slight moiré/glare potential
Minor reflection visible at bottom of phone screen
Slight perspective distortion from camera angle
Background (wooden table, window) visible around device — designer will need to crop/isolate
panel.text_found: POV: your teammate has the aim of a potato

issues: The magazine on the weapon appears somewhat short for the size of the firearm, though this is a minor detail and not a severe artifact.
Slight render-smoothness on skin texture edges hints at AI generation rather than true photoreal capture, but within acceptable threshold for source asset
Muzzle flash bloom is slightly over-saturated orange which may clip in some export pipelines — designer should check highlight recovery
Background soldiers (left) are soft/indistinct but this is acceptable depth-of-field for the brief
Minor debris particle duplication visible upper-right quadrant — within tolerable AI artifact range, not regenerate-level
Image appears to be closer to 1:1 crop ratio than 16:9 1920x1080 — designer will need to canvas-extend or reframe for thumbnail format
